title: pachuno #3975
definition:
1) to make thick, to make fat, fatten
 2) metaph. to make stupid (to render the soul dull or callous)
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to make thick, to make fat, fatten
 2) metaph. to make stupid (to render the soul dull or callous)

    NASB:  to thicken, to fatten, fig. to make dull:
